gist.headline: Sweeping up the old feed
gist.blurb: We did some spring cleaning and removed the legacy `/feed` endpoint from the image backend. The Nomnom creature had a great time eating the deleted code!
gist.summary: Removed the legacy Server-Sent Events `/feed` endpoint and its associated routing from the image generation backend.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces codebase bloat and removes unused routes without breaking existing clients that still pass legacy parameters.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old, dusty code printouts labeled '/feed', while Polly the bee sweeps up the area with a tiny broom.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round Nomnom creature happily eating a stack of dusty, deprecated code printouts labeled '/feed'. Polly the bee mascot wears a tiny scarf and sweeps the floor with a small broom. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
